ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jul-16-2024 Off Calendar

Petition To Revoke Probate Of The Will
Off Calendar Feb-07-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Petition To Revoke Probate Of The Will Filed Pro Se By Sandeep Singh Drall As Attorney In Fact For Prem Drall
Off Calendar Jan-25-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nicolas Flegel appeared by zoom for Srikanth Jujare (personal representative).
Sandeep Drall appeared by zoom in propria persona.

The parties presented oral argument to support their positions. Upon conclusion of argument, the Motion to Strike Petition to Revoke Probate of the Will is under submission.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.

Petition To Revoke Probate Of The Will
Off Calendar Dec-26-2023 Continued To Feb-07-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Jun-27-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Flegel, Esq. and Brittney Standley, Esq. counsel for and with Srikanth Jujare (appearing separatelyby video conference); Sandeep Drall, Objector in pro per (appearing by video conference from India).

The Court notes review Mr. Drall's objections and queries Ms. Standley as to any response. Ms. Standley reports that she has not been formally served with the objections but only noted them on the Register of Actions just this morning. Mr. Drall confirms that he mailed the objections just this past Friday - from India.

The Court notes that as Mr. Drall's objections are not jurisdictional, he can pursue his concerns notwithstanding the appointment of Ms. Jujare as Administrator. Given that consideration, the Court overrules Mr. Drall's objections. The Will dated October 24, 2020 is admitted to probate. Srikanth Jujare is appointed the Administrator with Will annexed with full authority under the Independent Administration of Estates Act. No bond is required as all beneficiaries have waived bond. Status on close of estate is set for hearing on July 16, 2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputy Gomez. Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Jun-06-2023 Continued To Jun-27-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Brittney Standley appearing via zoom for Srikanth Jujare (petitioner).

Sandeep Singh (Pro per) appearing via zoom (objector).

Mrs. Standely stated that property is in default, that HOA dues are past due and concerned about possible foreclosure, that she would need an extension for her client to serve as special administrator and that additional authorization is needed. The Court extends Mrs. Standelys request to extend time for her client to serve as special administrator. Mr. Drall stated that he has no objections. The petition for probate of will and for letters of administration with will annex/objection to petition for probate is continued to June 27, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Brown. Not reported.
EX PARTE PETITION FOR LETTERS OF SPECIAL ADMINISTRATION

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Apr-25-2023 Continued To Jun-06-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brittney Standley appeared by zoom for petitioner.
Sandeep Singh (brother) appeared by zoom in propria persona.

Mr. Singh stated that he objects to the petition and that he does not have an attorney. The court informed Mr. Singh that he needs to put his objections in writing and file them. Mr. Singh requested 45-days. Mrs. Standley stated that there is some urgency as the property is in pre-foreclosure. The court informed Mrs. Standley that she can do an ex parte request for appointment of a special administrator. Mr. Singh raised the issue of the manner and the timing of how the will was executed. The Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed is continued to June 6, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Singh to file his objections by May 30, 2023.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Aeyoung Kim. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.
